---
title: Broadcast Scheduler
summary: Open scheduling engine for live and automated radio playout — integrates with Liquidsoap, AzuraCast, and custom station software.
repoUrl: https://github.com/sonicverse-eu
status: "alpha"
order: 3
---

Broadcast Scheduler gives independent stations a programmable, self-hosted playout scheduler that connects to the tools they already run.

## What it includes

- Visual schedule builder with drag-and-drop hour blocks
- Integration adapters for Liquidsoap and AzuraCast
- Show rotation, live override, and fallback playlist support
- REST API for automation and third-party integrations
- Exportable schedule data in standard formats

## Why it exists

Most scheduler solutions are either locked to proprietary hardware or require expensive licensing. This project gives community stations a modern, open alternative that they can run on any server.

## Good fit for

- Community radio stations
- Podcast networks running live shows
- College and non-commercial broadcasters
- Teams wanting to replace legacy playout software
